airdrops.name: What are airdrops in cryptocurrency?
airdrops.description: What are airdrops in cryptocurrency? Airdrops in cryptocurrency refer to the practice of a cryptocurrency project distributing free tokens or coins to eligible wallets or accounts.

airdrops.name: How to get free crypto airdrops?
airdrops.description: How to get free crypto airdrops? Cryptocurrency airdrops typically require users to complete simple tasks like following social media accounts, sharing posts, or signing up for newsletters. They might also include interacting with crypto DApps. Check reputable crypto websites for current airdrop opportunities.

airdrops.name: How do I get an airdrop?
airdrops.description: How do I get an airdrop? To get a crypto airdrop, you need to actively participate in the crypto community by following the project on social media, engaging with their content, and completing tasks they provide. Common airdrop requirements include signing up in their web app, joining their Telegram/Discord group, engaging with their posts, or completing on-chain tasks.

airdrops.name: How do I find upcoming crypto airdrops?
airdrops.description: How do I find upcoming crypto airdrops? Check cryptocurrency project websites and social media for announcements. Many projects offer airdrops to reward early users and community members.
